hyperedges.label: AI quest suggestion pipeline (config, transport, wakelock, diagnostics)
Room persistence layer (database, DAOs, entities)
Data portability export/import (SPEC §9)
Daily reminder alarm/notification flow (schedule, fire, notify, complete, re-arm)
Achievements MVVM pair: Screen collects StateFlow from ViewModel via launchSafely
App startup wiring: Application builds AppContainer/repository; Activity and Widget read it
Today screen MVVM family (Screen wires VM to stateless Content via Actions)
Completion-with-undo pattern shared across Today and Quests via PendingUndo
Instrumented [uitest] suite exercising navigation and screens on the emulator
QuestRepository tests on in-memory Room + FakePrefs
ViewModel tests sharing setMain(UnconfinedTestDispatcher) + FakePrefs repo
Tests providing a FakePrefs ProfilePreferences implementation
AI quest-generation pipeline (prompt -> LLM -> parse -> validate -> fallback)
Reward economy (engine + level + streak + achievements + allowance)
Quest-generation factories feeding the daily planner
Reward/economy unit tests
End-to-end engine/economy scenarios
AI narration/quest safety tests
Reward economy: XP formula, anti-farm, caps, penalties, honesty, allowance
Safety & privacy: safety signals, local-first, backups-off, AI guardrails, key safety
CI pipeline: smoke, core-tests, full-tests, release, export-room-schema
